channel.title: Karten on Projektemacher Labs
channel.description: Recent content in Karten on Projektemacher Labs

item.title: Kartenmaterial
item.description: Preparations Before posts can be displayed on maps, the following steps must be taken: Geocoding of posts and / or tags Generation of an application-specific representations (GeoJSON, KML) After this has been done, the next step can be approached. An example of the old 3D images can be found here. Plotting data on a map in a browser The map material provided by OpenStreetMap can be used to display the generated data in the browser.
